FX.title: [USD/JPY] FLAT: AI Detects Mixed Signals as Geopolitical Risk Offsets Yield Differentials
tldr_points: Geopolitical headwinds (Iran tensions, Trump-Xi summit) counterbalance BoJ/Yield dynamics
Technical posture suggests consolidation between key support and resistance envelopes
Order flow remains ambiguous with no clear institutional accumulation/distribution signal
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY range-bound as macro crosscurrents offset; await catalytic trigger for directional break.
FX.comment: Range-bound as geopolitical risk offsets yield dynamics; await catalyst for directional bias

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI-Driven Momentum Sustains as Powell Shifts Rate Narrative
tldr_points: AI sector concentration driving near-vertical S&P 500 gains, creating single-sector dependency risk
Powell's hawkish pivot shifts rate expectations, pressuring growth valuations but supporting financials
Technical trend remains intact despite overbought conditions; pullbacks present accumulation opportunities
STOCKS.excerpt: AI concentration fuels S&P 500 while Powell's hawkish tone introduces volatility; buy dips
STOCKS.comment: AI concentration creates vulnerability but trend remains intact; buy dips with tight stops

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Inflows Accelerate as Regulatory Clarity Improves
tldr_points: Sixth consecutive week of $858M crypto fund inflows signals sustained institutional demand
Clarity Act progress and UAE licensing signal regulatory tailwinds turning bullish
Corporate treasury adoption accelerates with Capital B raise and Saylor's aggressive buyback thesis
CRYPTO.excerpt: Bullish momentum builds on institutional inflows and regulatory clarity; tactical long preferred.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish trend intact with institutional inflows and regulatory clarity providing structural support
